value.found_quote: The plugin has two extension points: a Markdown guidance file for the model-backed reviews, and a YAML or JSON patterns file for the per-edit string match. Both are additive.
value.rationale: The page's "Add your own rules" section explicitly describes two additive extension points (a Markdown guidance file and a YAML/JSON patterns file), matching the claim. The plugin is described as available on all plans with no deprecation, so it is active.
